info.title: MICROSERVICE_DEV_Schedule Appointments API
info.description: The Schedule Appointments API allows users to create and manage appointments efficiently within the system. This API facilitates operations related to scheduling new appointments, ensuring that users can organize their time and resources effectively. Typical consumers include appointment scheduling systems, calendar integrations, and service providers seeking to automate their booking processes. By using this API, businesses can streamline appointment management and improve user experience.

post.description: This endpoint allows users to create a new appointment in the system, providing the necessary details like date, time, and participant information.

requestBody.description: Request body for creating a new appointment. This JSON object should contain all necessary details for the appointment, such as date, time, and participants.

200.description: Returns the details of the successfully created appointment.

400.description: Indicates that the request parameters are invalid or missing.

500.description: Indicates an unexpected error occurred on the server.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.title: Appointment Operations Response

timestamp.description: The timestamp of when the response was generated.

status.description: The status code of the operation.

error.description: An error message if the operation failed.

message.description: A descriptive message related to the operation.
message.example: Unable to process appointment request due to internal service failure.

path.description: The path of the resource that was affected.

suggestion.description: Suggestions for further actions after the operation.
suggestion.example: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.description: This schema describes the response structure for successful appointment operations.

example.message: Unable to process appointment request due to internal service failure.

details.message: Database connection timeout while saving appointment details.

example.suggestion: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Opera.title: Operation Details

service.description: The name of the service handling the operation.

errorCode.description: An error code related to the operation, if applicable.

message.description: A message providing more context about the operation.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Opera.description: Provides additional details about the operation.

timestamp.description: The timestamp of when the error occurred.

status.description: The HTTP status code indicating the type of error.

error.description: A short description of the error.

message.description: A detailed message describing the error.
message.example: Unable to process appointment request due to internal service failure.

path.description: The path of the request that caused the error.

trace.description: A trace or stack trace information for debugging.

suggestion.description: A suggestion on how to correct the error.
suggestion.example: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.description: Schema representing the response structure for a failed appointment operation with a 400 status code.

example.message: Unable to process appointment request due to internal service failure.

details.message: Database connection timeout while saving appointment details.

example.suggestion: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

service.description: The service in which the error occurred.

errorCode.description: A specific code representing the type of error.

message.description: A more detailed message regarding the error.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Error.description: Detailed information about the error that occurred.

patientId.description: The unique identifier of the patient.

doctorId.description: The unique identifier of the doctor.

appointmentDate.description: The date of the appointment in YYYY-MM-DD format.

appointmentTime.description: The time of the appointment in HH:MM format.

department.description: The department where the appointment will take place.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.description: The request body schema for creating an appointment.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.title: Error Response for Appointments Operation

timestamp.description: The timestamp of the error occurrence.

status.description: HTTP status code representing the error type.

error.description: A short, human-readable summary of the error.

message.description: A detailed message explaining the cause of the error.
message.example: Unable to process appointment request due to internal service failure.

path.description: The path of the request that resulted in the error.

trace.description: A trace of the error for debugging purposes.

suggestion.description: A suggestion for the user on how to address the error.
suggestion.example: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.description: This schema represents the structure of error responses for failed appointment operations.
